title: QSVT QLSA
description: Quantum Singular Value Transformation (QSVT) based Linear System Solver (QLSA) implements matrix inversion through polynomial approximation, offering significant asymptotic complexity advantages.

params.help: A is the coefficient matrix in Ax = b. It should be a square matrix compatible with QSVTSolver, and its dimension must match len(b).
params.name: A
params.info: 请输入方阵二维数组，维度必须与b长度一致（如 [[0.8, 0], [0, 0.4]]）

params.help: b is the source vector in Ax = b. It must be a 1D vector whose length equals the dimension of A.
params.name: b
params.info: 请输入一维数组，长度必须等于A的维度（如 [1, 2]）

params.name: epsilon
params.info: 请输入浮点数，如 0.0001，范围在1e-10到1之间
